---
title: "ML Macroecon"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-17"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
install.packages("kableExtra")
library(data.table)
library(arrow)
library(stringr)
library(tidyverse)
library(fixest)
library(ggplot2)

library(kableExtra)


rm(list = ls()); gc()
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r cars}
DT = fread("~/Desktop/RA/Econ Sinica/Complied Data/DT3.csv")
str(DT)


#--------------------------------------------------
# 0) 假設 DT 已經在環境中
#--------------------------------------------------
setDT(DT)

#--------------------------------------------------
# 1) 先複製一份，避免直接改原資料
#--------------------------------------------------
dt0 <- copy(DT)

#--------------------------------------------------
# 2) tenor 標準化：只留 3M / 2Y / 10Y
#    這邊先靠 FullName 判斷
#--------------------------------------------------
dt0[, tenor := fifelse(
  grepl("10-Year", FullName, ignore.case = TRUE), "10Y",
  fifelse(
    grepl("2-Year", FullName, ignore.case = TRUE), "2Y",
    fifelse(
      grepl("3-Month|3 Month|\\b3M\\b", FullName, ignore.case = TRUE), "3M",
      NA_character_
    )
  )
)]

#--------------------------------------------------
# 3) 先把你要的 candidate sample 拉出來
#--------------------------------------------------


dt_candidate <- dt0[
  Select == 1 &
    h_months %in% c(3L, 6L, 9L, 12L, 18L, 24L) &
    !is.na(tenor)
]

# 檢查筆數
cat("Candidate sample size:", nrow(dt_candidate), "\n")

# 看 tenor x horizon 分布
print(
  dt_candidate[, .N, by = .(tenor, h_months)][order(tenor, h_months)]
)

#--------------------------------------------------
# 4) 整理成 modeling panel 的欄位命名
#    先保留 lineage 欄位，之後建模前可再刪
#--------------------------------------------------
panel_candidate <- dt_candidate[
  ,
  .(
    #---------------------------
    # identifiers / lineage
    #---------------------------
    country               = Country,
    source_series_name    = FullName,
    source_series_code    = Code_Base,
    source_code           = Code,
    code_sub              = `Code Sub`,
    ticker                = Ticker,
    cusip_code            = `CUSIP Code`,
    
    #---------------------------
    # panel structure
    #---------------------------
    tenor                 = tenor,
    forecast_date         = Observation_Dates_converted,
    forecast_quarter      = Trading_Date,
    target_date           = MaturityDate_converted,
    horizon_months        = as.integer(h_months),
    
    #---------------------------
    # target / benchmark
    #---------------------------
    current_yield_t       = Trading_MID_YTM_Quarter_Mean,
    realized_yield_tph    = Trading_Value_at_Maturity,
    bbg_consensus_tph     = Consensus_forecast_value,
    bbg_consensus_lag1    = prev_Value_num,
    forecast_revision     = fifelse(
      !is.na(r_bt),
      r_bt,
      Consensus_forecast_value - prev_Value_num
    ),
    target_error_e        = fifelse(
      !is.na(e_bth),
      e_bth,
      Trading_Value_at_Maturity - Consensus_forecast_value
    ),
    
    #---------------------------
    # local macro forecasts
    #---------------------------
    local_gdp_qoq_fcst    = GDP_QoQ_forecast,
    local_cpi_qoq_fcst    = CPI_QoQ_forecast,
    local_ca_qoq_fcst     = Current_Account_Prop_Quarter_forecast,
    
    #---------------------------
    # U.S. rates / macro
    #---------------------------
    us_3m_rate            = `EC3MUS Index`,
    us_2y_rate            = `EC2YUS Index`,
    us_10y_rate           = `BYXYUS Index`,
    us_gdp_qoq_fcst       = US_GDP_QoQ_forecast,
    us_cpi_qoq_fcst       = US_CPI_QoQ_forecast,
    us_ca_qoq_fcst        = US_Current_Account_Prop_Quarter_forecast,
    
    #---------------------------
    # crisis dummies
    #---------------------------
    sov_debt_crisis       = as.integer(SovDebtCrisis),
    currency_crisis       = as.integer(CurrencyCrisis),
    banking_crisis        = as.integer(BankingCrisis),
    crisis_data_missing   = as.integer(
      is.na(SovDebtCrisis) | is.na(CurrencyCrisis) | is.na(BankingCrisis)
    ),
    
    #---------------------------
    # audit flags
    #---------------------------
    select_flag           = as.integer(Select),
    usable_consensus_flag = as.integer(!is.na(Consensus_forecast_value)),
    usable_target_flag    = as.integer(
      !is.na(Trading_Value_at_Maturity) & !is.na(Consensus_forecast_value)
    )
  )
]

#--------------------------------------------------
# 5) 建議排序
#--------------------------------------------------
setorder(panel_candidate, country, tenor, forecast_date, horizon_months)

#--------------------------------------------------
# 6) 看一下整理後結果
#--------------------------------------------------
str(panel_candidate)
cat("panel_candidate rows:", nrow(panel_candidate), "\n")

# usable target sample（理論上就是你真正能拿來訓練 forecast error 的樣本）
panel_usable <- panel_candidate[usable_target_flag == 1]

cat("panel_usable rows:", nrow(panel_usable), "\n")

print(
  panel_usable[, .N, by = .(tenor, horizon_months)][order(tenor, horizon_months)]
)

#--------------------------------------------------
# 7) 檢查 key 是否重複
#    你理想上希望一列 = country x tenor x forecast_date x horizon
#--------------------------------------------------
dup_key <- panel_candidate[
  ,
  .N,
  by = .(country, tenor, forecast_date, horizon_months)
][N > 1]

cat("Number of duplicated keys:", nrow(dup_key), "\n")

if (nrow(dup_key) > 0) {
  print(head(dup_key[order(-N)], 20))
}

#--------------------------------------------------
# 8) 先存檔
#--------------------------------------------------
fwrite(panel_candidate, "~/Desktop/Machine Learning on MacroEcon/panel_candidate_h36912.csv")
fwrite(panel_usable,    "~/Desktop/Machine Learning on MacroEcon/panel_usable_h36912.csv")


str(panel_candidate)
```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure}

#--------------------------------------------------
# 0) 假設 panel_candidate 已經存在
#--------------------------------------------------
setDT(panel_candidate)

#--------------------------------------------------
# 1) 只留真正可用來預測 forecast error 的樣本
#--------------------------------------------------
panel_model <- copy(
  panel_candidate[usable_target_flag == 1]
)

cat("panel_model rows:", nrow(panel_model), "\n")

#--------------------------------------------------
# 2) 類別欄位整理
#--------------------------------------------------
panel_model[, tenor := factor(tenor, levels = c("3M", "2Y", "10Y"))]
panel_model[, horizon_months := factor(horizon_months, levels = c(3, 6, 9, 12, 18, 24))]

#--------------------------------------------------
# 3) crisis 變數處理
#    主規格建議：缺值補 0 + 保留 missing flag
#--------------------------------------------------
for (v in c("sov_debt_crisis", "currency_crisis", "banking_crisis")) {
  panel_model[is.na(get(v)), (v) := 0L]
}

panel_model[, crisis_data_missing := as.integer(crisis_data_missing)]

#--------------------------------------------------
# 4) 建立 ARX / ML 都會用到的主表
#    只保留主要欄位
#--------------------------------------------------
panel_main <- panel_model[
  ,
  .(
    #---------------------------
    # IDs
    #---------------------------
    country,
    tenor,
    forecast_date,
    forecast_quarter,
    target_date,
    horizon_months,

    #---------------------------
    # target / benchmark
    #---------------------------
    target_error_e,
    current_yield_t,
    realized_yield_tph,
    bbg_consensus_tph,
    bbg_consensus_lag1,
    forecast_revision,

    #---------------------------
    # local macro
    #---------------------------
    local_gdp_qoq_fcst,
    local_cpi_qoq_fcst,
    local_ca_qoq_fcst,

    #---------------------------
    # U.S. block
    #---------------------------
    us_3m_rate,
    us_2y_rate,
    us_10y_rate,
    us_gdp_qoq_fcst,
    us_cpi_qoq_fcst,
    us_ca_qoq_fcst,

    #---------------------------
    # crisis
    #---------------------------
    sov_debt_crisis,
    currency_crisis,
    banking_crisis,
    crisis_data_missing
  )
]

#--------------------------------------------------
# 5) 排序
#--------------------------------------------------
setorder(panel_main, forecast_date, country, tenor, horizon_months)

#--------------------------------------------------
# 6) 檢查主表
#--------------------------------------------------
str(panel_main)
cat("panel_main rows:", nrow(panel_main), "\n")
print(head(panel_main, 10))

#--------------------------------------------------
# 7) 缺值摘要
#--------------------------------------------------
na_summary <- data.table(
  variable = names(panel_main),
  n_missing = sapply(panel_main, function(x) sum(is.na(x))),
  pct_missing = sapply(panel_main, function(x) mean(is.na(x)))
)

setorder(na_summary, -pct_missing)
print(na_summary)

#--------------------------------------------------
# 8) 看 tenor / horizon 分布
#--------------------------------------------------
cat("\n=== tenor distribution ===\n")
print(panel_main[, .N, by = tenor][order(tenor)])

cat("\n=== horizon distribution ===\n")
print(panel_main[, .N, by = horizon_months][order(horizon_months)])

cat("\n=== tenor x horizon distribution ===\n")
print(panel_main[, .N, by = .(tenor, horizon_months)][order(tenor, horizon_months)])

#--------------------------------------------------
# 9) 存檔
#--------------------------------------------------
fwrite(panel_model, "~/Desktop/Machine Learning on MacroEcon/Data/panel_model_h36912.csv")
fwrite(panel_main,  "~/Desktop/Machine Learning on MacroEcon/Data/panel_main_h36912.csv")
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.

##Macro Vars (e.g. VIX, Brent Oil, GoldPrice. etc.) # 20260331 去補 2009 的資料！


```{r}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(lubridate)
library(purrr)

# =========================
# 1. Read raw Excel
# =========================
file_path <- "~/Desktop/Machine Learning on MacroEcon/Data/Macro_Var.xlsx"

macro_raw <- read_xlsx(file_path, sheet = 1, col_names = T)

# 看欄名
names(macro_raw)

# 清欄名
names(macro_raw) <- names(macro_raw) %>%
  str_replace_all("\\s+", "_") %>%
  str_replace_all("[^A-Za-z0-9_]", "")

# 先把 Dates 改成 date
macro_raw <- macro_raw %>%
  rename(date = Dates)

# 檢查一下
str(macro_raw$date)

# 轉型
macro_weekly <- macro_raw %>%
  mutate(
    date = as.Date(date),
    across(
      -date,
      ~ suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(.x)))
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(date))

str(macro_weekly)

# quick check
glimpse(macro_weekly)
summary(macro_weekly$date)

# =========================
# 4. Split global vs FX
# =========================
all_vars <- names(macro_weekly)[names(macro_weekly) != "date"]

fx_vars <- all_vars[str_detect(all_vars, "^USD[A-Z]{3}_Curncy$")]
global_vars <- setdiff(all_vars, fx_vars)

macro_global_weekly <- macro_weekly %>%
  select(date, all_of(global_vars))

macro_fx_weekly <- macro_weekly %>%
  select(date, all_of(fx_vars))

# =========================
# 5. Create forecast_quarter
# =========================
macro_global_weekly <- macro_global_weekly %>%
  mutate(forecast_quarter = paste0(year(date), "Q", quarter(date)))

macro_fx_weekly <- macro_fx_weekly %>%
  mutate(forecast_quarter = paste0(year(date), "Q", quarter(date)))

# =========================
# 6. Quarterly average: global
# =========================
macro_global_quarterly <- macro_global_weekly %>%
  group_by(forecast_quarter) %>%
  summarise(
    across(
      all_of(global_vars),
      ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    across(-forecast_quarter, ~ ifelse(is.nan(.x), NA_real_, .x))
  )

# =========================
# 7. Quarterly average: FX
# =========================
macro_fx_quarterly_wide <- macro_fx_weekly %>%
  group_by(forecast_quarter) %>%
  summarise(
    across(
      all_of(fx_vars),
      ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    across(-forecast_quarter, ~ ifelse(is.nan(.x), NA_real_, .x))
  )

# =========================
# 8. FX wide -> long
# =========================
macro_fx_quarterly_long <- macro_fx_quarterly_wide %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -forecast_quarter,
    names_to = "fx_ticker",
    values_to = "fx_usd_local"
  )

# =========================
# 9. Country <-> FX mapping
# =========================
fx_mapping <- tibble(
  country = c(
    "China", "Brazil", "Czech Republic", "Hungary", "Indonesia",
    "South Africa", "Korea", "Malaysia", "Mexico", "Philippines",
    "Poland", "Romania", "Russia", "Taiwan", "Thailand",
    "Turkey", "Vietnam", "Euro Area"
  ),
  fx_ticker = c(
    "USDCNY_Curncy", "USDBRL_Curncy", "USDCZK_Curncy", "USDHUF_Curncy", "USDIDR_Curncy",
    "USDZAR_Curncy", "USDKRW_Curncy", "USDMYR_Curncy", "USDMXN_Curncy", "USDPHP_Curncy",
    "USDPLN_Curncy", "USDRON_Curncy", "USDRUB_Curncy", "USDTWD_Curncy", "USDTHB_Curncy",
    "USDTRY_Curncy", "USDVND_Curncy", "USDEUR_Curncy"
  )
)

macro_fx_quarterly <- macro_fx_quarterly_long %>%
  left_join(fx_mapping, by = "fx_ticker") %>%
  select(country, forecast_quarter, fx_ticker, fx_usd_local)


macro_global_quarterly <- macro_global_quarterly[, -6]
# =========================
# 10. Save
# =========================
write.csv(macro_global_quarterly, "macro_global_quarterly.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(macro_fx_quarterly, "macro_fx_quarterly.csv", row.names = FALSE)


names(macro_global_quarterly)
unique(macro_fx_quarterly$country)
head(macro_global_quarterly)
head(macro_fx_quarterly)

```

## Combined

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)

panel_main <- fread("~/Desktop/Machine Learning on MacroEcon/Data/panel_main_h36912.csv")

str(panel_main)
names(panel_main)
unique(panel_main$country)

# =========================
# 1. Check panel_main keys
# =========================
# 確保 forecast_quarter 是字串
panel_main[, forecast_quarter := as.character(forecast_quarter)]
panel_main[, country := as.character(country)]

macro_global_quarterly <- macro_global_quarterly %>%
  mutate(forecast_quarter = str_replace(forecast_quarter, "^(\\d{4})Q([1-4])$", "\\1-Q\\2"))

macro_fx_quarterly <- macro_fx_quarterly %>%
  mutate(forecast_quarter = str_replace(forecast_quarter, "^(\\d{4})Q([1-4])$", "\\1-Q\\2"))

# 看一下 panel 裡有哪些國家
sort(unique(panel_main$country))

# =========================
# 2. Build FX mapping
# =========================
# 這裡請依照你 panel_main 的 country 名稱微調
fx_mapping <- data.table(
  country = c(
    "Brazil",
    "China",
    "Czech",
    "Hungary",
    "Indonesia",
    "South Korea",
    "Malaysia",
    "Mexico",
    "Philippines",
    "Poland",
    "Romania",
    "Russia",
    "South Africa",
    "Taiwan",
    "Thailand",
    "Turkey",
    "Vietnam",
    "Bulgaria" # 保加利亞使用歐元掛勾
  ),
  fx_ticker = c(
    "USDBRL_Curncy",
    "USDCNY_Curncy",
    "USDCZK_Curncy",
    "USDHUF_Curncy",
    "USDIDR_Curncy",
    "USDKRW_Curncy",
    "USDMYR_Curncy",
    "USDMXN_Curncy",
    "USDPHP_Curncy",
    "USDPLN_Curncy",
    "USDRON_Curncy",
    "USDRUB_Curncy",
    "USDZAR_Curncy",
    "USDTWD_Curncy",
    "USDTHB_Curncy",
    "USDTRY_Curncy",
    "USDVND_Curncy",
    "USDEUR_Curncy"
  )
)

# =========================
# 3. Create macro_fx_quarterly
# =========================
# 假設你前面已經有 macro_fx_quarterly_long:
# columns = forecast_quarter, fx_ticker, fx_usd_local

macro_fx_quarterly <- as.data.table(macro_fx_quarterly_long) %>%
  left_join(fx_mapping, by = "fx_ticker") %>%
  select(country, forecast_quarter, fx_ticker, fx_usd_local) %>%
  as.data.table()

macro_fx_quarterly <- macro_fx_quarterly %>%
  mutate(forecast_quarter = str_replace(forecast_quarter, "^(\\d{4})Q([1-4])$", "\\1-Q\\2"))


macro_fx_quarterly[, country := as.character(country)]
macro_fx_quarterly[, forecast_quarter := as.character(forecast_quarter)]

# 檢查 mapping 後哪些 ticker 沒對到 country
macro_fx_quarterly[is.na(country)] %>% unique(by = "fx_ticker")

# =========================
# 4. Prepare macro_global_quarterly
# =========================
macro_global_quarterly <- as.data.table(macro_global_quarterly)
macro_global_quarterly[, forecast_quarter := as.character(forecast_quarter)]

# =========================
# 5. Merge global vars
# =========================
panel_main_macro <- merge(
  panel_main,
  macro_global_quarterly,
  by = "forecast_quarter",
  all.x = TRUE
)

# =========================
# 6. Merge FX vars
# =========================
panel_main_macro <- merge(
  panel_main_macro,
  macro_fx_quarterly[, .(country, forecast_quarter, fx_usd_local)],
  by = c("country", "forecast_quarter"),
  all.x = TRUE
)

# =========================
# 7. Quick checks
# =========================
str(panel_main_macro)
names(panel_main_macro)

# 檢查合併後缺值
colSums(is.na(panel_main_macro[, .(
  CO1_Comdty,
  VIX_Index,
  XAU_Curncy,
  XAG_Curncy,
  fx_usd_local
)]))

# 看幾筆
nrow(panel_main)
nrow(panel_main_macro)

# 抽樣檢查
panel_main_macro[1:10, .(
  country, forecast_quarter, CO1_Comdty, VIX_Index, XAU_Curncy, fx_usd_local
)]

# =========================
# 8. Save merged panel
# =========================
fwrite(
  panel_main_macro,
  "~/Desktop/Machine Learning on MacroEcon/Data/panel_main_macro_merged.csv"
)
```

## Summary Statistic
```{r}
library(data.table)
library(knitr)

# 讀資料
dt <- fread("~/Desktop/Machine Learning on MacroEcon/Data/panel_main_macro_merged.csv")
setDT(dt)

# =========================
# Table 1：樣本國家概覽
# =========================
t1 <- dt[, .(
  N     = .N,
  Start = as.character(min(forecast_date, na.rm = TRUE)),
  End   = as.character(max(forecast_date, na.rm = TRUE))
), by = country]

knitr::kable(
  t1,
  format   = "latex",
  booktabs = TRUE,
  linesep  = "",
  col.names = c("Country", "N", "Start", "End"),
  caption  = "Sample Countries: Observation Counts and Time Coverage"
)

cat("\n\n")

# =========================
# Table 2：觀測值分布 Tenor × Horizon
# =========================

t2 <- data.table::dcast(
  dt,
  tenor ~ horizon_months,
  fun.aggregate = length,
  value.var = "target_error_e"
)

num_cols <- setdiff(names(t2), "tenor")

t2[, Total := rowSums(.SD), .SDcols = num_cols]

# 重新抓一次，因為現在已經多了 Total 欄
num_cols2 <- setdiff(names(t2), "tenor")

totrow <- as.data.table(
  t(c("Total", colSums(t2[, ..num_cols2])))
)
setnames(totrow, names(t2))

t2 <- rbind(t2, totrow, fill = TRUE)

show_names <- names(t2)
show_names[show_names != "tenor" & show_names != "Total"] <- paste0(show_names[show_names != "tenor" & show_names != "Total"], "M")
show_names[show_names == "tenor"] <- "Tenor"

knitr::kable(
  t2,
  format   = "latex",
  booktabs = TRUE,
  linesep  = "",
  col.names = show_names,
  caption  = "Observation Counts by Tenor and Forecast Horizon"
)
# =========================
# Table 3：目標變數描述統計（按 Tenor）
# =========================
t3 <- dt[, .(
  N      = sum(!is.na(target_error_e)),
  Mean   = round(mean(target_error_e, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
  Std    = round(sd(target_error_e, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
  Min    = round(min(target_error_e, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
  P25    = round(as.numeric(quantile(target_error_e, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)), 3),
  Median = round(median(target_error_e, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
  P75    = round(as.numeric(quantile(target_error_e, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)), 3),
  Max    = round(max(target_error_e, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
), by = tenor]

allrow <- dt[, .(
  tenor  = "All",
  N      = sum(!is.na(target_error_e)),
  Mean   = round(mean(target_error_e, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
  Std    = round(sd(target_error_e, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
  Min    = round(min(target_error_e, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
  P25    = round(as.numeric(quantile(target_error_e, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)), 3),
  Median = round(median(target_error_e, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
  P75    = round(as.numeric(quantile(target_error_e, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)), 3),
  Max    = round(max(target_error_e, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
)]

t3 <- rbind(t3, allrow, fill = TRUE)

knitr::kable(
  t3,
  format   = "latex",
  booktabs = TRUE,
  linesep  = "",
  caption  = "Summary Statistics of Forecast Error by Tenor (percentage points)"
)

cat("\n\\\\textit{Note:} Forecast error defined as realized yield minus professional consensus forecast.\n\n")

# =========================
# Table 4：預測誤差均值矩陣（Tenor × Horizon）
# =========================
t4 <- data.table::dcast(
  dt,
  tenor ~ horizon_months,
  fun.aggregate = function(x) round(mean(x, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
  value.var = "target_error_e"
)

knitr::kable(
  t4,
  format   = "latex",
  booktabs = TRUE,
  linesep  = "",
  col.names = c("Tenor", "3M", "6M", "9M", "12M", "18M", "24M"),
  caption  = "Mean Forecast Error by Tenor and Horizon (percentage points)"
)

cat(
  "\n\\\\textit{Note:} Positive values indicate consensus underprediction; negative values indicate overprediction. A systematic pattern of negative errors at short horizons and positive errors at long horizons is evident across all tenors.\n\n"
)

# =========================
# Table 5：主要 Predictor 描述統計
# =========================
pred_vars <- c(
  "current_yield_t", "bbg_consensus_tph", "forecast_revision",
  "us_10y_rate", "us_2y_rate", "VIX_Index",
  "local_gdp_qoq_fcst", "local_cpi_qoq_fcst", "local_ca_qoq_fcst",
  "CO1_Comdty", "SPX_Index", "fx_usd_local","us_gdp_qoq_fcst", "us_cpi_qoq_fcst", "us_ca_qoq_fcst"
)

pred_labels <- c(
  "Current yield at forecast date",
  "Consensus forecast of local sovereign yield",
  "Forecast revision (consensus change from prior quarter)",
  "U.S. 10Y yield consensus forecast (same forecast quarter)",
  "U.S. 2Y yield consensus forecast (same forecast quarter)",
  "VIX index (weekly, quarterly average)",
  "Local GDP growth consensus forecast (QoQ, \\%)",
  "Local CPI consensus forecast (QoQ, \\%)",
  "Local current account consensus forecast (QoQ, \\%)",
  "Brent crude oil price, CO1 (weekly, quarterly average, USD/bbl)",
  "S\\&P 500 index (weekly, quarterly average)",
  "FX rate: USD per local currency unit (weekly, quarterly average)",
  "U.S. GDP growth (QoQ, %)",
  "U.S. CPI (QoQ, %)",
  "U.S. current account (QoQ, %)"
)

t5_df <- data.frame(
  Variable = pred_labels,
  N        = sapply(pred_vars, function(v) sum(!is.na(dt[[v]]))),
  Mean     = sapply(pred_vars, function(v) round(mean(dt[[v]], na.rm = TRUE), 3)),
  Std      = sapply(pred_vars, function(v) round(sd(dt[[v]], na.rm = TRUE), 3)),
  Min      = sapply(pred_vars, function(v) round(min(dt[[v]], na.rm = TRUE), 3)),
  Median   = sapply(pred_vars, function(v) round(median(dt[[v]], na.rm = TRUE), 3)),
  Max      = sapply(pred_vars, function(v) round(max(dt[[v]], na.rm = TRUE), 3))
)

knitr::kable(
  t5_df,
  format   = "latex",
  booktabs = TRUE,
  linesep  = "",
  row.names = FALSE,
  escape   = FALSE,
  caption  = "Summary Statistics of Key Predictors"
)

cat(
  "\n\\\\textit{Note:} current\\_yield\\_t has 38\\% missing values (not available for all country-tenor combinations). fx\\_usd\\_local is reported in local currency units per USD; the large mean and standard deviation reflect cross-country variation in currency denomination.\n"
)
footnote(general = paste(
  "VIX, Brent crude (CO1), S\\\\&P 500, and FX rate are constructed",
  "from weekly observations aggregated to quarterly averages.",
  "current\\_yield\\_t has 38\\\\% missing values.",
  "All consensus forecast variables reflect market expectations",
  "formed at the forecast date for the same forecast quarter."),
  general_title = "Note:",
  escape = FALSE)


print(xtable(t1,
  caption = "Sample Countries: Observation Counts and Time Coverage",
  label   = "tab:countries"),
  include.rownames  = FALSE,
  booktabs          = TRUE,
  caption.placement = "top")

print(xtable(t2,
  caption = "Observation Counts by Tenor and Forecast Horizon",
  label   = "tab:obs"),
  include.rownames  = FALSE,
  booktabs          = TRUE,
  caption.placement = "top")

print(xtable(t3,
  caption = "Summary Statistics of Forecast Error by Tenor (percentage points)",
  label   = "tab:ferror"),
  include.rownames  = FALSE,
  booktabs          = TRUE,
  caption.placement = "top")

print(xtable(t4,
  caption = "Mean Forecast Error by Tenor and Horizon (percentage points)",
  label   = "tab:ferror_matrix"),
  include.rownames  = FALSE,
  booktabs          = TRUE,
  caption.placement = "top")

print(xtable(t5_df,
  caption = "Summary Statistics of Key Predictors",
  label   = "tab:predictors"),
  include.rownames  = FALSE,
  booktabs          = TRUE,
  caption.placement = "top",
  sanitize.text.function = identity)

```
